column1: # p53 (TP53) — conservation concentrated in the functional core.
# The tumor suppressor p53 is not uniformly conserved: its central DNA-binding
# domain (where most cancer mutations fall) is highly conserved across mammals,
# while the N- and C-terminal regions vary freely. With relativeTo=Human the
# middle of the alignment collapses to dots while the flanks stay full of
# letters — a clear picture of WHERE selection acts within a single protein.
# Columns: UniProt accession <TAB> row label. Human first (reference).
